text.title: ads-analytics-setup Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-analytics-setup as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using GA4 reserved event names (session_start, first_visit, etc.) for custom events.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reserved event names cause silent collision with GA4's automatically collected events. The custom events will either be dropped or overwrite system data, corrupting session metrics.

failure-mode.description: Using spaces or uppercase letters in UTM values.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Spaces get encoded as %20 or + differently across browsers and tools. Mixed case creates separate entries in GA4 reports. Both produce reporting fragmentation that requires manual cleanup.

failure-mode.description: Firing page_view events in single-page apps before the URL route is settled.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: GTM fires on history change events immediately. In some frameworks, the route update completes asynchronously after the history push. Early fires record the previous URL as the page_view location.
